name: python3-antlr4
title: python3-antlr4
description:
ANTLR 4.9 runtime for Python 3
Provides the Python3 runtime for parsers/lexers generated by ANTLR 4.
.
Also known as "antlr4-python3-runtime".
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pygrun because ANTLR 4.9 runtime for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pygrun as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pygrun [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pygrun.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pygrun with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pygrun --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
